word: H3683 - כָּסַח - kâçach - kaw-sakh' - Cut down

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּסח

Transliteration: kâsach

Phonetic: kaw-sakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cut down, cut away, cut off (of plants)
    1. (Qal) cut away (passive participle)
      1. of judgment (figuratively)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1010

Part(s) of speech: Verb
